productDisplayName: Timex Men Silver Toned Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analogue watch with silver toned, stainless steel, circular case, silver toned and black, rotating bezel with markingsDial style: Silver toned dial, has black hour and minute hands with glow-in-the-dark inlay, red seconds hand, white and silver toned markings with glow-in-the-dark inlays, branding below the 12 hour markFeatures: Three face chronograph display, date aperture at the 4 hour mark, INDIGLO night-light, screw to reset the time and two push buttons to reset the features Strap style: Silver toned, bracelet style strap secured with a butterfly strapWater resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects
